title: use ajp.com as a professional link to my work (cv, resume)
content:
use ajp.com as a professional link to my work (cv, resume)
use et4l.com to link between all connected artists

et4l is a lifestyle


Monthly Release Strategy
--Monthly email dump to subscribers with all my art created the previous month

host ALL of my ART on Et Ceter4
have artwork for each song with its own page ala the old etc.com'


http://simogo.com

Singles released on Free streaming services (description with date and link of full album). All free streaming is for presence, and pushing traffic towards the bandcamp store.

Create exclusive content that is not available for free (or even in some cases, online) in order to drive buying.

what kind of physical content do I want to sell? (chapbooks, prints/postcards, tees, records)


start kickstarter to build funds to properly fund masterwork LP promotion and tour
https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/[REDACTED:PHONE NUMBER]/awna-teixeiras-2nd-full-length-album-release-wild
